query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 AND createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant1_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant1_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as all_today,
  COUNT(*) as all_total
FROM calls;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 AND createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant1_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant1_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as all_today,
  COUNT(*) as all_total
FROM calls;
